category_sources: source_facts.description expands woob as Web Outside of Browsers; official GitLab README describes a library providing standardized APIs and data models to access websites.
display_name_sources: Official GitLab README title uses Woob; source_facts.name provides the lowercase package name woob.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README points users to woob.dev for more information about using woob, and woob.dev is the dedicated documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitLab project woob/woob contains the core code, site modules, applications, and README for Woob.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitLab README describe browserless website access through Python APIs, modules, capabilities, and applications.
